splitCandidates.name: buildOcrFormData
splitCandidates.reason: Pure-ish boundary with concrete output; easiest to diff by FormData keys.

splitCandidates.name: runOcrRequest
splitCandidates.reason: Endpoint/fetch/error status handling is cohesive, but touches network behavior.

splitCandidates.name: mapOcrResponse
splitCandidates.reason: Currently intertwined with autofill/history snapshot and state updates.

splitCandidates.name: useRunOcrState
splitCandidates.reason: May reduce line count but risks creating a setter bucket without clarifying flow.

splitCandidates.name: useRunOcr
splitCandidates.reason: Should happen after request/mapping/history seams are clearer.

splitCandidates.name: RunOcrControls
splitCandidates.reason: Props are still broad; safer after request/state boundaries shrink.

splitCandidates.name: RunOcrResultLayout
splitCandidates.reason: Would move many props and can obscure behavior if done before request split.

splitCandidates.name: history adapter
splitCandidates.reason: History snapshot preserves immutable autofill metadata; avoid in Phase 2A.

splitCandidates.name: restore/autofill adapter
splitCandidates.reason: Cross-feature restore logic; needs dedicated adapter precheck.

phase2ARecommendation.optionalScope: buildOcrFormData + runOcrRequest if strict no-behavior-change diff is easy
phase2ARecommendation.reason: FormData boundary is concrete, low blast radius, and directly improves findability.

validationPlan: FormData key before/after diff script candidate
